item.title: Turn repeated instructions into reusable skills in Lovable
item.description: Learn how skills in Lovable let you save reusable instructions as markdown files, so you stop repeating yourself every time you build.

item.title: Connect Lovable to Google Workspace and Gemini Enterprise to build apps and more on data you already have
item.description: Connect Lovable to Google Workspace and Gemini Enterprise to build apps and more on data you already have

item.title: We Gave Our Agent a Vent Tool
item.description: How Lovable is self-improving every hour by learning from production friction and building a corpus of problems and solutions, and by letting our main agent send feedback directly to its creators using a vent tool.
